video.title: CombiQuiz: Would You Rather + Guess the Profession by Emoji! 👔🔧
video.description:
Another CombiQuiz — two games in one video! 🎮

First, a fast Would You Rather warm-up (career edition). Then the real challenge: guess 35 professions from emoji clues alone — from Doctor to Construction Worker.

⏱️ 6 seconds per question — react fast!
🏆 Score 30+ and you're a true expert!
📍 10 Would You Rather + 35 questions | 4 rounds | 11 minutes

CombiQuiz Structure:
Warm-Up — Would You Rather (career edition!)
Round 1 — Easy
Round 2 — Getting Harder
Round 3 — Expert Level
Round 4 — Final Challenge

👍 LIKE if you scored more than 25/35!
🔔 SUBSCRIBE — new CombiQuiz videos every week!
💬 Drop your score below!
